2025-26 Indiana Pacers Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 19-63, Finished 14th in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: Rick Carlisle (19-63)

Executive: Kevin Pritchard

PTS/G: 112.4 (27th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 120.4 (25th of 30)

SRS: -7.64 (26th of 30) Pace: 101.0 (8th of 30)

Off Rtg: 110.9 (29th of 30) Def Rtg: 118.8 (23rd of 30) Net Rtg: -7.9 (26th of 30)

Expected W-L: 23-59 (26th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +10000, Over-Under 37.5

Arena: Gainbridge Fieldhouse Attendance: 682,287 (25th of 30)
